Tool Call: retrieve("Bone ring technique overview")

Based on the provided information and my review:
Evidence shows that "internal fixation of bone without fracture reduction" involves securing the bone without needing to realign fractured pieces beforehand. This method applies broadly across many types of bones, especially those prone to stress or trauma. The technique seems quite generalizable since it leverages modern materials like carbon fibers and hydroxyapatite coatings tailored towards enhancing stability. It avoids some risks inherent in manual alignment steps typically required before applying fixatives traditionally.
Given these points about flexibility & widespread usage mentioned above - I still don't see explicit references supporting the 'ring' aspect specified in Option A ("Bone ring technique").
